item.title: A New Vision for Washington: Scott introduces the Well Washington Fund payroll tax to protect state from Trump’s austerity budget. – Washington State House Democrats

item.title: 👎💵Brad Tower - Community Bankers of Washington
item.description: Brad Tower signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Community Bankers of Washington. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Megan Managan - Washington Bankers Association
item.description: Megan Managan signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington Bankers Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Pat Sullivan - Department of Natural Resources
item.description: Pat Sullivan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Natural Resources.

item.title: 👍💵Seamus Petrie - Washington Public Employees Association
item.description: Seamus Petrie signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Public Employees Association. They are a registered lobbyist.
